🎸 Build an AI-Powered Music Studio Booking App with Angular, NestJS & Firebase Genkit 🎶
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Join this hands-on workshop where we’ll build a complete music studio booking application from the ground up using a modern full-stack architecture.
Here’s what we’ll cover:
🎨 Frontend with Angular
Create a responsive and intuitive user experience for browsing and booking studio sessions.
⚡ Backend with NestJS
Develop a robust, scalable REST API to manage bookings, users, and business logic.
🤖 AI-Powered Booking Automation
Take the application to the next level by integrating Firebase Genkit to automate the booking workflow with AI, making the experience smarter and more efficient.
By the end of the workshop, you’ll have practical experience building a production-ready application that combines modern web development with the latest AI capabilities.
Whether you’re looking to sharpen your Angular and NestJS skills or explore how AI can enhance real-world applications, this workshop has something for you.
Looking forward to building together! 🚀
Join Aristeidis Bambakos workshop at Athens 2026 — October 21–23
#Angular #NestJS #Firebase #Genkit #AI #WebDevelopment #FullStack #JavaScript #TypeScript #SoftwareEngineering #Developer #Workshop
